center.name: 巴塔哥尼亞沙漠
center.summary: 巴塔哥尼亞沙漠是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括White-bellied seedsnipe、Short-billed miner，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the non-breeding season some move north in western Argentina as far as Mendoza Province. The short-billed miner inhabits the Patagonian Steppe, a landscape of barren plains with sparse grasses and scattered shrubs

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Outside that season it mainly inhabits the Patagonian steppe
